prose:
**Acrolein Fukui reactivity (computed)** — DFT **B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, chemkit tier `standard`, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz` (8 atoms). Backend reported by the tool as `dft`; partial charges are **Mulliken (PySCF)**. The Fukui calculation used the neutral state plus N+1/N−1 states: cation charge +1 multiplicity 2, anion charge −1 multiplicity 2. No `warnings` array was returned by the tool result. Engine integrity.trustworthy verdict: **true**.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom **4 C**, with **f+ = 0.64232102**. Most nucleophilic site = atom **1 O**, with **f− = 0.39388616**.

Per-atom Fukui descriptors from the tool:

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.40136419 | 0.39388616 | 0.39762517 | 0.0074780351 |
| 2 | C | 0.022255106 | 0.0059884352 | 0.01412177 | 0.01626667 |
| 3 | C | 0.43404673 | 0.091403097 | 0.26272491 | 0.34264363 |
| 4 | C | 0.64232102 | 0.087369815 | 0.36484542 | 0.5549512 |
| 5 | H | -0.1572595 | 0.085961423 | -0.03564904 | -0.24322092 |
| 6 | H | -0.2072029 | 0.1856796 | -0.010761648 | -0.39288251 |
| 7 | H | -0.062116996 | 0.084485809 | 0.011184406 | -0.14660281 |
| 8 | H | -0.073407645 | 0.065225658 | -0.004090993 | -0.1386333 |

Neutral Mulliken charges used by the descriptor calculation:
`[-0.287638, -0.058795676, 0.11920624, -0.23417552, 0.13072536, 0.069348651, 0.13095268, 0.13037627]`.

Reproducibility: chemkit CLI invocation returned by the tool:
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmphsxpdncd/live.json`

Plot written by the tool: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/argo_gpt-5.5/20260703-185138_acrolein_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.

The tool result did not provide a live `.out` log path or explicit SCF convergence flags; therefore I am not inventing those fields.
